title: QualityRun
description: A recorded code-quality review run (agency/capabilities/analyze/_main.py; Spec 381 §3). SERVES the intent; the score trend is a query over prior same-mode complete runs (analyze.graph('QualityRun') / manage.timeline), never a .brooks-lint-history.json sidecar. An incomplete (crashed) walk is recorded but excluded from the trend.

mode.description: The quality mode the run scored: review | audit | debt | test | health | sweep.

scope.description: The scope description the run covered (e.g. 'staged changes', 'whole repo').

score.description: The computed Health Score (0-100): max(0, 100 - Σ deduction(tier, preset)).

critical.description: Count of critical-tier findings in the run.

warning.description: Count of warning-tier findings in the run.

suggestion.description: Count of suggestion-tier findings in the run.

status.description: 'complete' runs feed the trend; 'incomplete' (a crashed/partial walk) is recorded but excluded from the delta (Nygard).
